title: Measuring Spoon Set, 4PCS Food Measure Spoon Measuring Scoop Cups with Wooden Handle for Kitchen Cooking Baking
features: 【Stainless Steel】 : Measuring spoons are made of stainless steel, which is not easy to rust; they will maintain good performance and appearance whether in daily use or long time storage.

【Comfortable Grip】: Equipped with wooden handle, comfortable grip, excellent hand feeling when using; Wooden handle is not only beautiful, but also provides a grip, avoiding hand fatigue when using for a long time.

【Clear Scale】: The handle has a clear scale marking, clear and accurate when measuring, to ensure that each measurement can achieve the required accuracy. Two unit value scale (tbsp/ml), you can choose to use according to your habit.
【Practical Design】: Easy to clean, ensuring cleanliness every time you use it, perfect for kitchen environments; rounded edges are designed to not hurt your hands, making it safer to use.

【Multi-purpose】: We offer 4 different capacities of measuring spoons, suitable for different scenarios; Whether you are measuring coffee beans, flour, milk powder, milk tea powder or tea, etc, it can be easily dealt with.
